$comment: DESIGN PROTOTYPE — stays a prototype, and CANNOT adopt the v1 schema mechanism yet: the schema's widget set is the curated catalog primitive leaves (numeric / color / toggle / select / readout / section), with NO list widget. Layer/style LISTS are expert-leaf territory (data-bound documentCollection reads + per-row layer ops through paged.mutate) — an honest limit of the v1 schema, recorded in BREAKAGE_LOG.md B-01 (RESOLVED) and plugin-sdk DESIGN.md §12. A layers panel ships as an expert-leaf React panel (host.contribute.panel) until the catalog grows a list primitive.

rows.$comment: Expert leaf: visibility toggle → layerSetVisible, lock → layerSetLocked, rename → layerSetName, reorder → layerMove. Scoped to the edit context's subtree once edit contexts exist (B-02).
